data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 13, Reflecting a Weakening Altcoin Trend
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 13. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance. Over the past 90 days, 13 of these altcoins have outperformed Bitcoin in terms of price growth, signalling a weakening altcoin trend.

data.title: Megabit will launch BROCCOLI/USDT perpetual contract, supporting up to 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will launch BROCCOLI/USDT 1-75 times perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT TIME) on March 12, 2025

data.title: Fortress Initiative Aims To Enhance Security In Cryptocurrency Liquidity Management
data.description:
According to PANews, Nano Labs, SlowMist, and Aquarius have announced the establishment of the Fortres Foundation and the launch of the Fortress Initiative. This initiative introduces a security design framework and process audit standards aimed at setting new benchmarks for safety and transparency in cryptocurrency liquidity management. The framework covers various stages of the liquidity management lifecycle, including risk assessment, continuous monitoring, and incident response. It also incorporates measures such as smart contract code audits and multi-chain asset security monitoring to ensure comprehensiveness and practicality.

The Fortress Initiative plans to achieve industry integration through a one-year roadmap, initially focusing on inviting asset management protocols and ecosystem partners with BTC staking needs to participate in its development. The initiative has garnered support from leading industry institutions such as Nano Labs, SlowMist, and Aquarius. Additionally, Takara Lend, a lending protocol supported by the Sei blockchain, has joined as one of the first donor members.

data.title: Base Network Sees Significant Increase In Transactions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Dune reveals that the Base network recorded 6.84 million transactions on March 11, marking an 11.9% increase compared to the 6.11 million transactions on February 11.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage trading giant whale 20x leverage long BTC, opening price 82003.9 USD
data.description: According to data from Hypurrscan, a whale trading on Hyperliquid with 50x leverage started to open long BTC with 20x leverage. Its current position is about 147 BTC (about 12.16 million US dollars), with a cost of 608,000 US dollars, an opening price of 82,003.9 US dollars, and a liquidation price of 42,958 US dollars.

data.title: LBank has launched PUBLIC U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the PUBLIC U-based perpetual contract at 14:45 (SGT) on March 12, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: CME Fed Watch: The probability of the Fed cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in March is 3%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to CME's "Fed Watch" data, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in March is 3%, and the probability of maintaining unchanged is 97%.

data.title: Matrixdock announces AI-compatible upgrade of its RWA product to promote a smarter financial era
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport's leading real-world asset (RWA) tokenization platform Matrixdock announced product upgrades and will upgrade its gold tokens (XAUm) and short-term treasury bill tokens (STBT) to AI compatibility in order to seize the strategic opportunity of AI-driven financial management.
Matrixdock proposed the concept of "financial Lego" and upgraded its RWA products to "asset management tools that can be directly connected to AI-driven" by integrating standardized API interfaces. After the product upgrade is completed, Matrixdock's products will achieve three major breakthroughs:
-Intelligent investment strategy-AI dynamically configures XAUm and STBT to improve the efficiency of portfolio management
-Automated risk management-provides predictive analysis to reduce the risk of market fluctuations
-Scalable intelligent financial infrastructure-AI-driven protocols will be dynamically adjusted according to market conditions to ensure continuous liquidity and efficiency
Although AI finance is still in its early stages, Matrixdock has launched an ecological expansion plan and will continue to iterate the intelligent interaction capabilities of its RWA products. Matrixdock also calls on more partners and industry pioneers to join in the co-construction to create a smarter financial era.

data.title: Hyperliquid whales increase their holdings to nearly 80,000 ETH, with a total holding value of $152 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the whale that previously made a profit of $9.28 million in Hyperliquid's 50x leveraged trading has recently increased its ETH long orders again, and its positions have expanded rapidly.
Initial position: 3.485 million USDC was recharged as margin, holding 17,130 ETH (about 31.2 million US dollars), the average opening price was 1,863.62 US dollars, and the liquidation price was 1,677.1 US dollars.
Secondary increase in position: increased to 21,790.74 ETH, with a total value of 40.85 million US dollars.
Extreme increase in position: The current position has increased to 42,633 ETH, worth 81 million US dollars, and there is only 63 US dollars left for the liquidation price.
Continue to place orders: Place an order for 21,958 ETH (about 52 million US dollars) at the price of 1,894 US dollars. If all transactions are completed, the position will exceed 80,000 ETH, and the total value will reach 152 million US dollars.
Market impact: After the whale opened the order, ETH quickly rose to break through 1,900 US dollars. The market is concerned about whether it will continue to increase its position.
This high-leverage bet by the whale may be related to the upcoming CPI data.
